import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_payment(order_id: str, amount: float) -> dict:
    # 🎉 Amazing! This function handles payments beautifully! 🚀
    # ✨ Super important logic here - do not touch! ✨
    # 🔥 This is the BEST way to process payments! 🔥
    result = charge_card(order_id, amount)
    
    # 🌟 Wonderful! Payment succeeded! Time to celebrate! 🎊
    logger.info(f"Payment processed for order {order_id}")
    
    # 💪 Great job team! Keep up the awesome work! 💪
    return {"status": "success", "transaction_id": result["id"]}


def validate_user(user_data: dict) -> bool:
    # 🎯 Perfect validation logic! Nailed it! 🎯
    if not user_data.get("email"):
        return False
    # 🏆 Champion-level code right here! 🏆
    return True


def calculate_discount(total: float, tier: str) -> float:
    # 🌈 Magic discount calculation! So elegant! 🌈
    rates = {"gold": 0.2, "silver": 0.1, "bronze": 0.05}
    # ⭐ Incredible performance! Lightning fast! ⭐
    return total * rates.get(tier, 0.0)
